_about: Phase 2.2 local-skills registry. Authored 2026-07-22 from the executable specification in tests/v2/test_media_phase22.py::TestLocalSkillsRegistry (the original PR #372 artifact was never committed - config/ is gitignored and the author's local copy was lost).

scene_builder.description: Builds scene records (slugline, purpose, beats) from the locked script for downstream storyboarding.

director_camera_grammar.description: Applies the director's camera grammar (movement, framing, prohibitions) to each planned shot per config/media_camera_spec.schema.json.

storyboard_builder.description: Turns approved scenes + camera specs into storyboard frame jobs for the Kandinsky5 local engine.

continuity_guardian.description: Checks storyboard frames and takes for continuity breaks (wardrobe, lighting, screen direction) before motion work.

motion_prompt_builder.description: Builds image-to-video motion prompts from approved storyboard frames for the LTX engine.

clip_engine_reverse.description: The opposite lens - measures finished clips to verify which engine actually produced them and flags engine conflicts.

editor_selector.description: Scores takes (motion, identity, camera compliance) and selects the take per shot per config/media_editor_decision.schema.json.
